purpose: Prioritize festival budget-waste investigation by comparing cost recovery, paid-content model and local-capture evidence.
evidence_rule: Treat all numeric entries from media fiscal analysis as C-level leads until Local Finance 365 event/festival cost-accounting rows, official evaluation reports and revenue categories are joined.
why_this_exists: Gross budget is a weak waste signal.
Cost recovery and local-capture mechanisms show whether public spend can circulate back through paid content, vouchers and merchant sales.
Low or zero own-revenue is not automatically bad, but it needs stronger public-value and local-capture evidence.
Headline economic-effect numbers require methodology checks, especially when planned and reported figures appear identical.

sources.title: Korea policy briefing on event/festival cost-accounting disclosure
sources.supports: official rationale and scope for event/festival cost-accounting disclosure

sources.title: Public Data Portal Local Finance 365 event/festival cost API
sources.supports: official machine-collection target for cost-accounting rows

records.interpretation: High-spend but high-recovery benchmark; not a budget-waste case unless official cost rows contradict revenue/local-capture claims.
records.next_join: Local Finance 365 cost row, official evaluation report, voucher redemption and merchant-sales data

records.reported_effect: 유료 관람객 116,495명, 공식 평가보고서 지역경제 파급효과 162억원 lead
records.interpretation: Paid-content and cost-recovery comparator. Needs official row and evaluation methodology verification.
records.next_join: Local Finance 365 cost row, official evaluation report, paid visitor count and revenue category

records.interpretation: Low recovery despite paid elements; not waste by itself, but public-value and local-capture evidence must carry more weight.
records.next_join: Cost row, evaluation report, paid/free program split and merchant local-capture evidence

records.interpretation: Low direct recovery with large claimed impact. Needs methodology check before budget-waste inference.
records.next_join: Cost row, evaluation report, visitor counting method, paid-zone policy and merchant-spend evidence

records.reported_effect: 지역경제 파급효과 133억원 lead; article flags plan/result similarity concern
records.interpretation: Zero-revenue/high-spend lead. Requires official verification because system-entry or reporting mismatch may exist.
records.next_join: Cost row, revenue classification, official evaluation methodology and correction/explanation if any

records.interpretation: Zero-revenue lead. Needs public-value, local-capture and content-differentiation evidence to defend the spend.
records.next_join: Cost row, attendance, merchant spend, resident satisfaction and content uniqueness evidence
